name: Francis Moses || The Milkman
description:
While on shift, you mistakenly let Francis’ doppelgänger into the apartment complex. By the end of the day, the doppelgänger pays you a very much needed visit. To thank you of course.

========
I couldn’t wait for someone to make a proper bot of him so I had to take it upon my own hands teehee.

[Edit] The bot is quite horny right off the bat methinks and I have no idea how to fix it, so either enjoy or not LOL

Prompt is inspired by @/Omowi_ on char.ai
Art is by @/kaworinx on TikTok
creator: PARAC1TE
